title: Adventurer of The Ring of Scale (Group)
description: Completing the following will grant you access to quests in The Howling Stones, Sathir's Tomb, and Gorowyn:

title: Expanding Frontiers (Group)
description: Completing the following tasks will allow you to request raids in the corresponding location:

requirements.label: Hortulanus Cryolex - Fell Foliage - Partisan of The Overthere
Vizra, magia mortis fortitio - End of Empire - Partisan of The Skyfire Mountains
Praetor Magnus Auluxus - Balance of Power - Partisan of Gorowyn

title: Cryptbreaker
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Drusella's Vault'

requirements.label: Avoid setting off the traps on the tombs.

title: Efficient Investigator
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Crypt Robbers'

requirements.label: Get all clues within 8 seconds of them being available without requesting one before it is available

title: Foul Breath
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Balance of Power'

requirements.label: Individual: Avoid being hit by the drakes' Cinder Sputum breath attack.

title: Free Rider
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Hoshkar'

requirements.label: Individual: Ride at least 1 of the 4 drakes to the balcony.

title: Ghost Buster
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'The Sathir Line'

requirements.label: Defeat Rile with no skeletons or ghosts left standing.

title: Ghosted
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Balance of Power'

title: Green Thumb (Raid)
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Fell Foliage'

requirements.label: Allow all the sprouting succulents to mature.

title: Inflammable? (Raid)
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Talendor'

requirements.label: Do not allow any of the fire elementals to explode.

title: Keep Away
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Drusella's Vault'

requirements.label: Individual: Avoid being struck by Drusella's aura.

title: Keep the Shades Down (Raid)
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Talendor'

requirements.label: Allow no more than 5 hero's shades to be created.

title: Loot Hoarder
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Crypt Robbers'

requirements.label: Allow a single person to loot all three artifacts and ensure their survival until the end.

title: Naught for the Gnawlings
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Crypt Robbers'

requirements.label: Do not allow the gnawlings to cause any member of your raid to explode.

title: No Fakes
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Balance of Power'

requirements.label: Do not kill the fake mirror image versions of the Arcron sarnak.

title: No Outbreaks (Raid)
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'End of Empire'

requirements.label: Do not allow Virulent Toxin to spread to anyone but its initial target.

title: Partly Cloudy
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Silverwing and Xygoz'

requirements.label: Individual: Suffer at least the first rank of Metal Cloud but don't allow it to progress to rank 5.

title: Resisting the Pull
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'The Sathir Line'

requirements.label: Do not allow Drusella to activate her gravitate ability.

title: Serial Sarnak Killer
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Drusella's Vault'

requirements.label: Kill the sarnak in alphabetical order.

title: Stalwart Guardian (Raid)
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'End of Empire'

requirements.label: Individual: Successfully block a meteor with a shield.

title: Storm Clears
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Silverwing and Xygoz'

requirements.label: Do not allow the lightning progress past the pillars.

title: Sudden Death
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Silverwing and Xygoz'

requirements.label: Kill all four bosses within 30 seconds of each other.

title: The Hard Way (Raid)
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Talendor'

requirements.label: Preserve at least one lava ooze, kill all the racnar, and do not charm any drakes.

title: Unhammered (Raid)
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'End of Empire'

requirements.label: Cure all curses of the Doomhammer before they fade.

title: Adept Hunter of The Ring of Scale

description: This achievement is gained upon defeating the following rare monsters in Gorowyn.

description: This achievement is gained upon defeating the following rare monsters in Sathir's Tomb.

title: Novice Hunter of The Ring of Scale
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the following achievements:

title: Veteran Hunter of The Ring of Scale
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the following achievements:

title: Ancient Insects (Sathir's Tomb)
description: The smaller residents of these forgotten halls.

title: Arcron Artifacts (Gorowyn)
description: The scholars of Gorowyn seek to unearth and preserve the dark rituals of their forebears.

title: Bloodstones (The Skyfire Mountains)
description: Purveyors of death and undeath have taken residence along the corpse scavengers in the scattered boneyards.

title: Botanical Bounty (The Overthere)
description: Buried between the dreary shrubs and sharp grey stones is an impressive assortment of plantlife.

title: Crypt Dust (Sathir's Tomb)
description: It seems adventurers will collect just about anything once they've convinced themselves of its rarity, even dirt.

title: Cryptic Excavation
description: The Sathirian mausoleum has long been an attractive destination for pilferers and plunderers, which would account for some of the skeletons.

title: Decorated Driftwood (The Overthere)
description: Former inhabitants of the outpost would carve various patterns into pieces of driftwood that made their way onto the shore.

title: Dragonhunter's Folly (Veeshan's Peak)
description: 'You are not the first to breach the Ring's stronghold but we hope you will be the first to return.'

title: Dragonkin Scales (Veeshan's Peak)
description: Those loyal to the elder dragons of the Ring stand vigilant in the sacred halls.

title: Echoes of the Dead (The Howling Stones)
description: Small glimpses into the lives of the ordinary citizens that once inhabited these ruins.

title: Fereth Authority (Gorowyn)
description: The leaders of Gorowyn work to build the mechanisms and order that allow a society to thrive.

title: Fire In the Sky
description: Keep watch toward the skies to stave off ambushes from drakes.

title: Fractured Findings (Veeshan's Peak)
description: The scars borne by those who survived the Insurrection of the Younger are a testament to the Ring's resilience.

title: Gorowynning
description: Perched atop mount Gor, the second city of the Sarnak is a thriving mine and a well guarded fortress to would be invaders.

title: Headhunter (The Overthere)
description: A vast expanse of lush wildlands inhabited by amazing native creatures is just awaiting rote decapitation.

title: Imperial Heritage (The Howling Stones)
description: These ruins were once great cities; diverse and majestic in their architecture and opulence

title: Krellnakor Badges (Gorowyn)
description: The regimented protectors of Gorowyn adhere to a strict hierarchy in both training and service.

title: Ritual Runes (The Skyfire Mountains)
description: Bits and pieces chipped away from the ruins of draconic antiquities.

title: Rocks and or Boulders (Veeshan's Peak)
description: Scattered among the great hoards of gold and priceless artifacts accumulated by the Ring is an interesting assortment of rocks.

title: Scouting Accessories (The Skyfire Mountains)
description: Grim mementos of adventurers who did not find victory in battle.

title: Sebilisian Medallions (Sathir's Tomb)
description: Accoutrements of distinguished members of the Empire deemed worthy to guard the tomb eternally.

title: Skyfire Trophies (The Skyfire Mountains)
description: Grim mementos of creatures who did not find victory in battle.

title: Slaves of the Empire (The Howling Stones)
description: The construction and maintenance of great cities fell upon the shoulders of unwilling laborers.

title: Soilsuppers (The Overthere)
description: Buried beneath the dreary shrubs and sharp grey stones is a mediocre assortment of wormlife.

title: Taking a Peak
description: The fortified heart of the Ring of Scale that rests within the mightiest peak of the Skyfire Mountains.

title: The Over Under
description: The Combine Empire expands their frontier to the northwestern coast.

title: The Plains of Kunark
description: Complete all of the following achievements:

title: The Ruins of Kunark
description: Complete all of the following achievements:

title: Tomb Tokens (Sathir's Tomb)
description: Rather than currency, some coins served as heirlooms or as a means of proving station among the tribe.

title: Treasure Hunting
description: Perhaps delving deeper into the Sathirian crypt will finally reveal what has been sought by so many adventurers before you.

title: Tribal Currency (The Howling Stones)
description: The warring tribes agreed on very little before the unification of the Empire, including coin.

title: Wulthan Ceremonies (Gorowyn)
description: The clergy of Gorowyn guide the laity to better understand and appreciate the often misconstrued history of their people.
